business_ideas.idea: YouTube kids channel roll-up (acquire existing channels like Cocomelon/Blippi for monetization)
Alternative streaming platform by recruiting top creators with exclusivity deals ($500M budget)
GLP-1 injection tracking app (like Shatzi for Ozempic - identify trend, build niche app)

Identifying undervalued platform opportunities requires insider knowledge of creator economics
GLP-1 drugs trend spawning category of niche tracking apps (40M users opportunity)
